allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('crate',{}\); print\('Crate:', c.get\('name'\)\); print\('Newest:', c.get\('newest_version'\)\); print\('Description:', c.get\('description',''\)[:100]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
